joy.text: In response to your message, I'm detecting a strong positive feeling-tone, which is pleasant. In this case, I'd say the feeling-tone is one of awe and wonder, which would be a pleasant and exciting tone. The idea of seeing a galaxy as it existed 13.4 billion years ago, just 300 million years after the Big Bang, is a mind-boggling concept that sparks curiosity and fascination. So, I'd classify the feeling-tone as pleasant and inspiring!
